name: Corn Bread by James Beard, Chef
recipeInstructions: Preheat the oven to 400°F. Butter an 8-1/2x11 inch baking pan. Sift the flour, salt, sugar, and baking powder into a large bowl, mixing thoroughly and distributing the baking powder evenly. Beat in the eggs and milk using a wooden spoon until well mixed. Beat in the cream and melted butter last. Pour into the buttered pan and bake for 18 to 20 minutes. While still hot, cut into squares and serve wrapped in a napkin.
